missing.name: ERIC Thesaurus
missing.maintainer: Institute of Education Sciences (IES), US Dept of Education
missing.notes: Covers education research. 4,578 descriptors + 7,219 synonyms. Updated annually.

missing.name: AGROVOC
missing.notes: 41,409 concepts in 42 languages. Actively maintained, monthly releases. GACS Core maps to CAB Thesaurus and NAL.

missing.name: GeoRef Thesaurus
missing.notes: Primary geosciences vocabulary. 33,700+ terms. Updated annually. Strong overlap with our earth science categories.

missing.name: INSPEC Thesaurus
missing.domain: physics, electrical engineering, electronics, computing, IT
missing.notes: 10,000+ controlled terms. Hand-indexed by scientists for 50+ years. Covers physics and engineering deeply.

missing.name: IEEE Thesaurus
missing.notes: 12,045 terms. Updated regularly (116 new terms Jan 2025). Covers IEEE-specific technical and scientific terminology.

missing.name: INIS Thesaurus
missing.notes: 31,000+ terms in English. Covers all aspects of peaceful nuclear energy use. Strong overlap with DOE OSTI.

missing.name: CAB Thesaurus (CABI)
missing.domain: agriculture, life sciences, veterinary, human health
missing.maintainer: CABI (Centre for Agriculture and Bioscience International)
missing.notes: Largest life sciences thesaurus: 182,060 concepts + 3M total terms/labels in 12 languages. Maps to AGROVOC via GACS.

missing.name: NAL Thesaurus (NALT)
missing.notes: 135,000+ terms in 17 categories. NALT Core (14,196 concepts) + NALT Taxon (52,978 organisms). Updated annually.

missing.name: Emtree (Embase)
missing.notes: ~89,000 preferred terms + 430,000 synonyms. 2x larger than MeSH. Strong drug/chemical coverage. Updated 3x/year.

missing.name: EuroVoc
missing.domain: EU policy, law, economics, international relations
missing.maintainer: Publications Office of the European Union
missing.format: SKOS, Linked Open Data, 24 EU languages
missing.notes: 7,000+ concepts in 21 domains. Policy-focused rather than scientific but covers environment, energy, technology.

missing.name: Unified Astronomy Thesaurus (UAT)
missing.notes: 2,100+ concepts in 11 categories. Open source. Used by AAS journals, NASA ADS. Replaced older isolated thesauri.

missing.name: USGS Thesaurus
missing.notes: Strict hierarchy conforming to NISO standards. Covers USGS research themes. Complements GeoRef for US geology.

missing.name: Getty Art & Architecture Thesaurus (AAT)
missing.notes: 55,661 concepts + 131,000 terms. 7 facets. Used globally for art/architecture. Updated bi-weekly.

missing.name: STW Thesaurus for Economics
missing.notes: 6,000+ headings in English/German + 22,000 synonyms. ISO-25964 compliant. Free reuse under CC license.

missing.name: Wikidata
missing.notes: 110M+ items. Not a traditional thesaurus but a structured knowledge base. Properties map to many standard vocabularies.

missing.name: SNOMED CT
missing.notes: 360,000+ concepts. Clinical terminology standard used in electronic health records. More clinical than research-focused.

summary.recommendation: AGROVOC, GeoRef, INSPEC, and INIS would add the most complementary coverage to our existing sources. AGROVOC fills agriculture gaps beyond DOE. GeoRef deeply covers geosciences. INSPEC covers physics/engineering with expert-curated indexing. INIS bridges nuclear science between DOE OSTI and IAEA.
